title: Athena
description: Motion-U AI — the first club to ever have its own AI assistant. Ask Athena anything, and she’ll guide you through the entire Motion-U ecosystem.

title: Motion-U API
description: Motion-U API is a unified API service designed to encourage a strong developer culture within the Motion-U committee. With a single API key, Motion-U members gain access to all Motion-U systems through one centralized platform.

title: Certify
description: A Bulk Certificates Generator, No more manual labor.

title: CodeDojo Website
description: CodeDojo is an initiative by Motion-U designed to help members grow into better developers through hands-on practice, problem-solving, and real-world projects..

title: MFSH website
description: Modern Full-Stack Hero (MFSH) is a beginner-friendly workshop designed to introduce students to every aspect of web development, including front-end and back-end development.

title: CFS in Touch
description: CFS in Touch is one of Motion-U programs that helps our foundation students prepared for real world of software engineering.

title: Neurena
description: Neurena is a web application inspired by Plato, but with a modern twist. It brings Athena and Neura together, bridging the wisdom of the past with the boundless possibilities of the future—where philosophy meets the age of space and intelligence.

title: Neuradmin
description: Neuradmin is one of Motion-U products that part of Motion-U ecosystem, Neuradmin are platform that use to organize and manage athena and neura knowledge making sure our AI assistant have the latest knowledge about Motion-U.

title: Ramadhan With Motion-U
description: A comprehensive companion for your Ramadhan goals. Track your progress, find daily wisdom, and strengthen your connection.
